problem id: a4146eb7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  01000001 -> 00000000
  10110110 -> 00010010
  10100101 -> 01010000
  11010101 -> 01001010
  10110100 -> 00010010
  01000100 -> 00000000
  01010000 -> 00001000

query: 11010010
predicted answer: 00001000
